database_meta.name: AI Wingman Forge — Public Platform Database
database_meta.description: Sanitized platform data for the Forge build planner. Contracts, funding, and operational intel are excluded.
database_meta.license: Data sourced from public manufacturer specs, DoD program announcements, and industry reporting.
